common.selectedBatteriesAssign: {count} batteries selected and will be assigned to the selected dealer

telemetry.paramRelay: Parameter Channel: APP Bluetooth relay available
telemetry.paramRelayWaiting: Parameter Channel: waiting for APP Bluetooth connection
telemetry.cloudConnectedNoLive: Cloud subscription connected (no live data yet)
telemetry.card4gDesc: Dashboard and cell data use MQTT Socket pass-through by default; cloud active reporting remains as fallback when pass-through fails.
telemetry.no4gTitle: Current device has no 4G communication card ID
telemetry.no4gDesc: Switched to cloud data display mode. Parameter read/write requires the mobile APP to connect to the device over Bluetooth and relay commands.

params.channelHint: Parameter read/write supports two channels: 4G devices can manually connect to MQTT parameter pass-through; BLE devices use APP Bluetooth relay. This channel status does not affect dashboard/cell cloud data display.

flags.rtcOrCellUltraLowVoltageChargeDisableFau: RTC / Ultra-low Cell Voltage Charge Disable Fault

messages.relayStatusFailed: Failed to get APP relay status
messages.cloudLoadFailed: Failed to load cloud realtime data
messages.relayHint: Please connect this device via Bluetooth in the mobile APP first. The web console will then use the relay parameter channel automatically.
messages.offlineSet: Offline now, unable to set parameters
messages.noParamPermission: Current account has no permission for this parameter
messages.offlineReadAdvanced: Offline now, unable to read advanced parameters
messages.offlineFunction: Offline now, unable to set function config
messages.noFunctionPermission: Current account has no permission to operate function config
messages.offlineFactory: Offline now, unable to execute factory command
messages.noFactoryPermission: Current account has no permission to execute factory command
messages.factoryConfirm: Factory command may affect device operation. Continue?

param.CELL_OC_ALARM_RELEASE_DELTA_V: Cell OC Alarm Release Delta Voltage
param.CELL_OVER_TEMP_RELEASE_C: MOS High Temp Protect Release Temp
param.MOS_OVER_TEMP_RELEASE_DELAY_S: MOS High Temp Protect Release Delay
param.CELL_UNDER_TEMP_RELEASE_C: Charge Low Temp Protect Release Temp
param.CHARGE_OVER_TEMP_RELEASE_C: Charge High Temp Protect Release Temp
param.CHARGE_OVER_TEMP_RELEASE_DELAY_S: Charge High/Low Temp Protect Release Delay
param.DISCHARGE_UNDER_TEMP_RELEASE_C: Discharge Low Temp Protect Release Temp
param.DISCHARGE_OVER_TEMP_RELEASE_C: Discharge High Temp Protect Release Temp
param.DISCHARGE_OVER_TEMP_RELEASE_DELAY_S: Discharge High/Low Temp Protect Release Delay

dashboard.title: BMS Dashboard
dashboard.dealerRealtimeHint: Dealer accounts currently show realtime points only. Historical dealer sampling will be added later.

import.requiredHint: Required: battery serial ID (maps to devices.device_number), batch number, product spec, order number, and BMS communication type (Bluetooth / 4G / Bluetooth + 4G). Optional: battery model (matched by name), Bluetooth MAC, 4G communication card ID, production date, and warranty expiry.

dealer.filterWarrantyHint: Note: the warranty list does not currently support direct dealer filtering and only shows aggregate numbers. Add a dealer_id filter later if needed.
dealer.authHint: This configuration binds users under the dealer to template roles (Casbin), controlling visible menus and accessible pages.

batteryList.deleteContent: Deleting this battery also deletes its related business data and cannot be undone. Continue deleting "{device}"?
batteryList.batchFactoryResult: Batch factory out completed: total {total}, success {success}, failed {failed}
batteryList.otaCreated: OTA task{taskId} created: total {total}, accepted {accepted}, rejected {rejected}
batteryList.offlineHint: Tip: offline commands are stored only when the device is offline. They run automatically after the device comes online and can be checked on the Offline Commands page.
batteryList.batchCommandHint: Tip: offline devices are skipped and returned with failure reasons. Use Offline Commands if offline execution is needed.
batteryList.batchOtaHint: Tip: the system creates upgrade task details for each device and pushes them immediately. Offline or upgrading devices show failure reasons in task details.

org.wxmpConfigDesc: This configuration only applies to the WeChat Mini Program connected to the current PACK factory. After saving, Mini Program login uses only the WeChat user system, and Home Banner plus public content are displayed independently for this Mini Program.
org.contentDisabledHint: Save the Mini Program configuration in Basic Info before maintaining content.

params.title: Remote Parameter View and Edit: {device}
params.hint: Select writable parameters and enter new values before dispatch. Values can be JSON numbers, booleans, objects, or arrays.
